description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with two main rectangular volumes connected by a central passageway. The exterior is clad in vertical gray wooden siding, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The roof is steeply pitched and finished in a dark material, likely asphalt shingles or metal, enhancing the clean lines of the structure. Large windows dominate the front and side facades, providing ample natural light and visual connection to the outdoors. The house sits on a green lawn, with the main entryway recessed between the two volumes for added privacy. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, with an emphasis on geometric forms and open, airy spaces.
description: A modern, minimalist house with two steeply gabled volumes clad in gray wood and large windows, connected by a central passageway. The design emphasizes clean lines, natural materials, and abundant light.
description_view_0: The view shows the rear or side of the house with long, uninterrupted gray wooden siding and three large window openings, set against a green lawn.
description_view_1: This view highlights the front facade with two steep gabled roofs, large windows, and the recessed main entryway between the two volumes.
description_view_2: The opposite side of the house is visible, featuring a simpler facade with smaller, asymmetrically placed windows and continuous wood siding.
description_view_3: This view shows the back or secondary entrance, with the two gabled volumes and a central connecting section, minimal window openings, and a clean, unadorned look.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entryway between two volumes, minimalistic door, no porch or decorative elements
